CreateAlarmMasking.name: Masking rule name
CreateAlarmMasking.instances.dimensions: List of instance dimension key-value pairs
CreateAlarmMasking.periodType: Masking period type, default FOREVER, options: FOREVER/FIXED/RELATIVE
CreateAlarmMasking.beginTime: Masking start time, required when periodType is FIXED
CreateAlarmMasking.endTime: Masking end time, required when periodType is FIXED
CreateAlarmMasking.dailyBeginTimestamp: Daily masking start timestamp, required when periodType is RELATIVE
CreateAlarmMasking.dailyEndTimestamp: Daily masking end timestamp, required when periodType is RELATIVE
